community.elastic.elastic_bulk.short_description: Perform actions with documents using the Bulk API.
community.elastic.elastic_bulk.description: Perform actions with documents using the Bulk API.

community.elastic.elastic_cluster_health.description: Validate cluster health. Optionally wait for an expected status.

community.elastic.elastic_index.description: Manage Elasticsearch indexes. Create indexes and drop indexes. Perform some index maintenance operations. Create indexes with settings and mapping documents. No support for settings or mapping document updates. check_mode only relevant to present and absent states.

community.elastic.elastic_index_lifecycl.description: Manage Elasticsearch Index Lifecyles. Create, update and delete Index Lifecycle Polcies.

community.elastic.elastic_keystore.short_description: Manage entries in the Elasticsearch keystore

community.elastic.elastic_reindex.short_description: Copies documents from a source to a destination.
community.elastic.elastic_reindex.description: Copies documents from a source to a destination. The source and destination can be any pre-existing index, index alias, or data stream.

community.elastic.elastic_snapshot.description: Manage Elasticsearch Snapshots. Create, delete and restore snapshots.

community.elastic.elastic_snapshot_repos.description: Manage Elasticsearch Snapshot Repositories. Create and delete repostories. At present no update functionality.
